events.title: European Commissioner Andrius KUBILIUS in Warsaw, Poland

items.title: European Commissioner Andrius KUBILIUS in Warsaw, Poland
items.summary: Signing of the contribution agreement concluded between Poland and the Commission relating to the Resilience and Recovery Facility contribution of Poland to the IRIS² programme Welcome address by the host, Karolina ŁUKASZEWICZ, Deputy Director of DKS Speeches: Marcin KIERWIŃSKI, Polish Minister for Internal Affairs and Administration Andrius KUBILIUS, European Commissioner for Defence and Space Shruti VYAS, SpaceRISE Coordinator, SES Signing of the agreement Signing of the memorandum Presentation of a certificate of appreciation to Polsa – the Polish Space Agency presented by Tomasz SZYMANSKI, Secretary of State at the Ministry of the Interior and Administration

items.title: European Commissioner Andrius KUBILIUS in Warsaw, Poland
items.summary: Press conference by Marcin KIERWIŃSKI, Polish Minister for Internal Affairs and Administration and Andrius KUBILIUS, European Commissioner for Defence and Space

events.title: EC archives of the week

items.title: EC archives of the week (12-18/07): Brussels European Council (12-13/07/1976, 50 years ago) Birth Simone Veil (13/07/1927, 99 years ago) France National Day (14/07) Terrorist attack in Nice (14/07/2016, 10 years ago) 11th Asia/Europe Meeting (ASEM11), Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia (14-16/07/2016, 10 years ago) European floods (14/07/2021, 5 years ago) World Youth Skills Day 2026 “Skills for a shared future” (15/07) Visit of Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission, to Ireland to present the Commission’s assessment of the national recovery plan under NextGenerationEU (16/07/2021, 5 years ago) Election of Simone Veil as President of the EP (17/07/1979, 47 years ago) Nelson Mandela International Day (18/07)
items.summary: Details to follow
